title: odontochilus elongatus
intro: Odontochilus elongatus, also known as the Tiger's Eye or Tooth-axil Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Odontochilus elongatus are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the Odontochilus elongatus plant are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and pills, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
